description: Deal Forecast Algorithm Fixes. (1) buildWinRateTrend hardcodes months ['May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct'] regardless of current date — semantically incorrect data (B-06, forecast-algorithm.ts:283). Fix to derive from actual 6-month window. (2) DEFAULT_STAGE_PROBABILITIES diverge: validators has NEEDS_ANALYSIS=30/PROPOSAL=70 while domain/service/router/forecast-algorithm uses 40/60 (B-08). Unify to single source of truth. (3) buildMonthlyRevenue uses locale-dependent toLocaleString for month names — breaks on non-en-US servers (B-15, forecast-algorithm.ts:269). (4) Forecast trend values hardcoded as 12 and 5 in forecast page (F-16, deals/forecast/page.tsx:709-710). Compute from API data. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 4, 6.

wiring_complete.target: Win rate trend matches actual date window; single probability source

notes: Deal/opportunity domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md.
